task: Map-Safe Parcel Focus and Highlight Readiness

notes: The current frontend ParcelDetailResponse type contains identity, location, valuation, parcel context, zoning, governance, planning, and metadata fields only.
The current FastAPI parcel detail router does not expose include_geometry or geometry_format parameters yet.
Backend planning documents identify centroid/geometry as future API fields, but implemented endpoint responses are attribute-only.

no_op_safety_behavior.current_ui_status: Parcel Detail Drawer displays Map focus pending geometry for real parcel search/detail selections.

integration_points: Parcel search result selection creates a ParcelMapFocus object with focusSource=search.
Command palette parcel inspection creates a ParcelMapFocus object with focusSource=command.
Parcel detail close clears local parcel map focus state.
Parcel Detail Drawer displays focus source, focus status, centroid availability, and SceneView action readiness.

validation.browser_console_smoke: not run; in-app Browser tool was not callable in this session

next_required_step.backend: Add governed parcel centroid/extent support to the parcel detail endpoint or a dedicated parcel map-focus endpoint.
next_required_step.frontend: After centroid/extent support exists, connect the SceneView bridge to zoom and draw a non-destructive parcel highlight overlay.
next_required_step.phase_6_gis_map_intelligence: Ready for true parcel highlight planning; not ready for zoom/highlight execution until centroid or geometry is returned by the API.
